name: create_contractor_payment
description: Process a payment for a 1099 contractor. Supports fixed-amount and hourly payment calculations. Gusto handles tax withholding and generates the appropriate 1099 forms at year-end.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the company making the payment.

parameters.name: contractor_uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the contractor to pay.

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: How to deliver the payment: 'Direct Deposit' or 'Check'.

parameters.name: wage
parameters.description: The total payment amount in dollars.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours worked (for hourly contractors).
